urdu transliteration text:
Bano se aake khwab me kehta tha sheer khwaray amma mai dadi k paas hun.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The baby would appear in Bano’s dream and tell her…“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Furqat me meri yoon na karo dil ko beqararAy amma mai dadi k pas hun.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: “Don’t get restless at my separation from you”.“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Pani ki ek boond bhi Mai pa bhi nahi saka,Maqtal se khaima gah Mai aa bhi nahi saka
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I was not given a single drop of water…I was not able to return to the tents from the battle field…

urdu transliteration text:
Tumko gale ka zakhm dikha bhi nahi saka,Zalim ka teer ho gaya gardan k aar paar.Ay amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I was not able to show you my pierced throat…The perpetrator’s arrow tore across my neck“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Aakar Jo mere halq pe teer E sitam laga,Sukhe gale se khoon ka chashma ubal pada
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The moment the arrow struck my throat…There was a fountain of blood that gushed out…

urdu transliteration text:
Chullu me leke Baba ne chehre pe mal lia,Acha hua KI tumne na dekhi wo khoo'n ki dhaarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: My father took the blood in is hands and wiped his face with it…I am grateful that you did not witness this horrific scene. “O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Tabdeel meri pyas ka manzar na ho saka,
Tha khushq halq khushq raha tar na ho saka
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The status of my thirst never changed…My throat was dry and remained as such…

urdu transliteration text:
Turbat me bhi sukoon mayassar na ho sakaNaize se zalimo'n ne ukhara mera mazaarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I had no peace even in my grave,The enemies even dug me out of my grave…“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Pehle kia shaheed mujhe teer maar kar pheri gale pe tegh lehed se nikal kar
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: First the enemies killed me with the arrow…Then they slit my throat after taking me out of my grave…

urdu transliteration text:
Phir naize pe chadhaya gaya haye mera sar,Mujh par sitam kiye hain layeeno'n ne baar baarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: After that, they put my head on a spear…The enemies have tortured me over and over.“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Aaya Jo khaima gah se Baba ki God me,Phir ja na paya Bali Sakina ki God me
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When I came back from the battlefield in my Baba’s arms,I was not able to go my sister Sakina

Had I gone back to Madina, I would have played in my sister’s lap. Alas! Who has control over destiny? “O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”
Jata watan to khelta Behna ki God me,Taqdeer par raha hai bhala kiska ikhtiyar.Ay amma mai dadi k pas hun

urdu transliteration text:
Mahaul dil kharash tha qatl gah me,Sare gunah gar the shamil gunah me
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The atmosphere was deadly in the battle field…All the perpetrators were involved in this sin…

urdu transliteration text:
Khaya kisi ne Rehem na zalim sipah me,Meri lehad bana k bahot royi zulfiqarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: No one showed mercy on me…Zulfiqar cried profusely after digging my grave.“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Sadmo'n ne mera nanna sa dil choor kar dia,Taqdeer ne behen se bahot Door kar dia
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Calamities have torn apart my little heart…My fate has taken me far away from my sister…

urdu transliteration text:
Mai kya kahun ki maut ne majboor kar diaKeh do Sakina se na kare mera intezarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How can I say that death has made me helplessTell Sakina not to wait for me any more. “O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”

urdu transliteration text:
Fakhri tere kalaam ki wo ehmiyat nahi,Meesum Tere bayan me wo kaifiyat nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Fakhri (poet), your writing does not have the power…O Meesum (reciter) your recitation does not have the power…

urdu transliteration text:
Us dard ko sametne ki haisiyat nahi,Jis dard se tarap k ye kehta tha sheer khwarAy amma mai dadi k pas hun
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: To encapsulate the pain.. With which the baby would tremble and say…“O Mother, I am with my Grandmother (Bibi Fatima (a))”
